Sales Agent

Outreach Agent

An Outreach Agent writes a personalised first-line for every prospect based on their company context, sends sequenced emails and LinkedIn messages at the right intervals, and triages replies — so your sales team spends time on conversations, not sending.

FAQ

Common questions about Outreach Agent.

How personalised is the outreach?
Each message is personalised using the prospect's company context: recent news, funding, job postings, LinkedIn activity. The first line is different for every prospect.
How many touchpoints does a sequence have?
Configurable. Default: 5 touchpoints over 14 days. Email 1 (day 1), follow-up (day 4), LinkedIn connection (day 6), LinkedIn message (day 9), final email (day 14).
What's a realistic reply rate?
For well-targeted B2B with genuinely personalised messages: 8–15% reply rate. Industry average for template blasts: 2–3%.
Does it send on my behalf?
Yes. Connected to your Gmail or Outlook. Messages come from your email address.
How does it triage replies?
Interested → CRM task + Slack alert. Not now → schedule follow-up in 60 days. Not interested → remove from sequence. Unsubscribe → immediately removed.

Deploy Outreach Agent for your team.
